Acted as connective tissue between partners and Microsoft engineering teams, ensuring partner feedback directly **influenced API roadmap** decisions through data-centric presentations to leadership under executive visibility.

tailoring_notes: Reframed MSFT FT as forward-deployed/partner-facing engineering: owning 3P technical relationships, sandbox validation, and feeding friction back into API roadmap to mirror the JD.
